The definition of this widget has changed - Mendix Forum

The definition of this widget has changed

0

We all know it, we upgrade a module and multiple errors are created for updated widget definition. 'fixing' is easy by just updating them all, but it is not clearly stating what you are doing. This is not low-code, this is blind trust.


It would be a good idead to improve the Message by putting the version of the widget used in the module, and the version used in your project. This will show whether you are using an outdated widget version and should update the actual widget, or that the downloaded module is using outdated widgets. In the second case, you can just click update, and inform the Developers of your downloaded module they shoud update their widgets.


asked 2026-04-14
Jord ten Bulte - Toll
0 answers
